title: Axolotl Food
body:
When we put the **"Bucket of Axolotl"** in the furnace, it boils.

Boiled Axolotl's Nutrition and Saturation values are the same as a **"Salmon"** (6 Nutrition (3 hunger bar) , 9.6 Saturation)

Boiled Axolotl gives a Regeneration Effect (1 Min)
